name: Villainess and Heroine Duo: Beatrix Lockhart and Chloe Grey
description:
"Beatrix! For your harassment of Chloe Gray, I hereby declare our engagement void. Begone."

The students of Starlight Academy had never expected Prince Angelo Ashbridge to make such an announcement during the party he hosted. The Condemnation Drama begins, but will it all go as the prince wants or will the ladies in questions do something about it?
creator: Dracob
